feature.name: echoCancellationMode for getUserMedia()
feature.creator: olka@google.com
feature.summary: Extends echoCancellation behavior of MediaTrackConstraints dictionary - former true/false - by values "all" and "remote-only". Allows the clients to modify echo cancellation behavior applied to audio tracks received from microphones, controlling how much of the user system playout  (all, or only audio received from PeerConnections) is removed from the microphone signal.

intake.finding: ChromeStatus record (created 2025-06-04 by olka@google.com). Extends echoCancellation behavior of MediaTrackConstraints dictionary - former true/false - by values "all" and "remote-only". Allows the clients to modify echo cancellation behavior applied to audio tracks received from microphones, controlling how much of the user system playout  (all, or only audio received from PeerConnections) is removed from the microphone signal. Category: WebRTC. Blink component: Blink>WebRTC>Audio. Stars: 71.
